subject: refactor(triggers): sequential sweep with pause-between-each and priority order
body:
start/go now runs triggers one at a time in priority order
(rev → aud → doc → tap → perf → sec → dbg), pausing after each
for user to fix/skip/stop. This ensures the most important checks
run first since most sweeps won't complete all 7 before merging.

clean/cln and improve/imp moved to standalone-only (not in sequence).

Tags: documentation, triggers, dx, process
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
title: sequential sweep with pause-between-each and priority order
